ab: ma’ut kung niyan sali i Maya aw?
en: A: May I ask if Maya’ is home?

ab: niyan sali hiya,uwah zik sali.
en: She’s at home, please come in.

ab: ma’ut kung ni, niyan sali i Puyap aw?
en: A: Is Puyap at home?

ab: ungat sali yu, kiya nanu ku yuwaw su?
ch: B:她不在，請問你有什麼事?
en: B: She’s not here, what can I do for you?

ab: ima sa?
en: B: Who is it?

ab: yutas, kuzing ga Maya’, gyahiy tikay lihun.
en: A: Grandpa, I’m Maya’, please open the door.

ab: ima su pi?
en: B: Who is it?

ab: Puyap, kuzing ga Maya’, muwah kung hamkani su manaw isu.
en: A: Puyap, I’m Maya’, I’ve come to play with you.

ab: basiya ta ini pakatayux la.
en: A: Long time no see.

ab: hu ga! sanun misu la.hazi uwah matisan han!
ch: B:是啊!我很想念你。快來聊天吧!
en: B:Yeah! I miss you so much. Come on, let’s chat!

ab: tala’ung, nabu tikay su saha han.
en: B: Please sit down and have some tea.

ab: mahuway su!
en: A: Thank you.

ab: nabu saha’.
en: B: Please have some tea.

ab: tiya~ kinbalay balay bugun ku saha’ mamu.
en: A:Your tea is delicious.

ab: mani’ay ta su babuway ra’iri han!
en: B: Let’s eat fruit!

ab: aw! balayi balay taxan ku babuway ra’iri hani.
ch: B:好喔!這些水果看起來很棒。
en: A: Yes! These fruits look great.

ab: balayi ni’un ku babuway ra’iri hani ?
en: B: How is the fruit?

ab: hu yu,balayi balay ni’un ku babauway hanii.
en: A:Yes, it’s really delicious.

ab: kamasu pahapuy kabagi’an yaya la,hazi uwah mani laki!
ch: A:媽媽煮好晚餐了，快來吃吧!
en: B: Mom has cooked dinner, come and eat!

ab: aw, hala kung mayma ba han.
en: A: Okay, I’ll go wash my hands.

ab: kalawkah mani ki, bliy su sa’uli .
ch: A:盡量吃喝，你又不是外人。
en: B: Try to eat and drink as much as possible, you’re not an outsider.

ab: payux wayan mu ni’un la, matangi la ki.
en: A: I ate a lot, I’m full.

ab: kapayux hazi mani, laxiy i abaga yu.
en: B: Eat more, don’t be polite.

ab: aw, sahiya’ balay ni’un.
en: A:Well, it’s delicious.

ab: pahari kung la ki, makataxay ta sautux la.
ch: A:我要離開了，下次再來看你。
en: A: I’m leaving, I’ll see you next time.

ab: aw han, pakataxa ta lawziy.
en: B: Okay, goodbye.

ab: malahangan la, musa kuzing sali la yu.
en: A: It’s late, I’m going home.

ab: uwah macisan lawziy sa’utux yu!
en: B:Come again next time!

ab: tahuway la,pinbaga su hakayan su.
en: B: Walk slowly and carefully.

ab: aw, kiyan la hari su ga, iri muwah matisan sali mu.
en: A: Okay, come to my house sometime.
